name: Earthquake
directions: Mix in blender for 15 sec at high with ice.
Strain into a cocktail glass and garnish with fruit.

name: Bellinis
directions: Combine half of peaches and apricot nectar in container of an electric blender, and process until smooth.
Repeat procedure with the remaining peaches and apricot nectar; freeze.
Remove peach-apricot mixture from freezer 30 minutes before serving.
To serve, spoon about 2/3 cups mixture into each stemmed glass and add 2/3 cups champagne.

name: Hummers
directions: Mix one part vodka with one part Kahlua in a blender.
Add ice cream as the vodka and Kahlua are blending.
As mixture thickens, add ice cubes and more ice cream until you reach the desired consistency.
Serve a thinner mixture to drink out of a brandy snifter.
Pour or scoop a thicker mixture into a sherbet glass and serve with a dessert spoon.

name: The Red-Head Cactus
directions: Combine all ingredients except lime and sugar in a blender and blend until slushy, adding more ice if necessary.
To prepare glasses, moisten rims with a lime slice and dip in a plate of sugar.
Fill glasses and garnish with lime wheel slices.

name: Cayman Mudslide
directions: Blend all ingredients along with a large scoop of crushed ice in a blender until smooth.
Serve in a hurricane glass--additional Kahlua optional.

name: Grape-Cherry Cooler
directions: Process all in blender until smooth.
Pour over crushed ice.

name: Orange Cappuccino Instant Coffee Mix
directions: Mix (This is more efficient if done in a food processor but it is not necessary).
Use 3 teaspoons per mug of boiling water.

similar.name: Frappuccino Light...just Like That Star Place

name: Orange Cinnamon Instant Coffee Mix
directions: Mix (More efficient if done in food processor but not necessary).
Use 3 teaspoons per mug of boiling water.

name: Frosty Sour
directions: Put all ingredients in blender.
Process until ice is almost all liquified.
Strain into whiskey sour glasses.

name: Ayran - Chilled Turkish Yoghurt Drink
directions: Mix well all ingredients in a blender.
Taste, you may want to increase the salt or lemon juice.
Chill.
Serve cool, like a beverage.

name: Soya milk
directions: Soak the soya beans in water overnight.
Make sure that the water can always totally cover the beans.
Whirl the beans with water in a blender little by little until a smooth mixture is obtained.
Filter the mixture with muslin-made bag (or other fine cloth).
Pour the mixture into a pot.
Cook the mixture and add the sugar.
Remove the foam floating on the surface whenever necessary.
Take the pot away from heat when it has just boiled.
You can enjoy the soya milk whether immediately or freeze it.

name: Carrot and Celery Juice
directions: Scrub the carrots well and cut the tops off the carrots.
Wash the celery.
Cut the celery, carrot and ginger to an appropriate size that will allow you to process the vegetables in your juicer.
Mix well once the vegetables have been juiced.
Now enjoy.
Note: if you like the heat and flavour of the ginger you can increase the amount you juice.

name: Drambuie Dragon On Skates
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender container.
Process until well blended.
Serve as an after-dinner drink in 5 or 6 oz.
glasses.
Sprinkle with additional cinnamon, if desired.

name: Orange Blossom
directions: Place all ingredients in blender container.
Process until of sherbet like consistancy.
Serve in cocktail glasses with short straws.

name: Cardamom Lassi
directions: In a blender bowl, put half cup of water, yogurt, sugar, cardamom, almonds and salt.
Cover.
Blend thoroughly.
Add the remaining water and lemon juice.
Blend again.
Serve chilled.

name: Icy Lemonade
directions: Place half of the lemonade concentrate and 12- 15 ice cubes in a blender; add 2 cups lemon-lime soda.
Cover and process on high until ice is crushed.
Repeat with the rest of the ingredients.
Serve immediately.

name: Frothy Orange Drink
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender; add ice cubes.
Cover and process until drink is thick and slushy.

name: Whisper (After dinner drink/dessert)
directions: Place ice cream in blender or food processor.
Pour in brandy and creme de cacao.
Blend.
Put in freezer to chill.
Serve in tall champagne glasses.

name: Nutty Irishman
directions: Blend well in blender and serve.

name: Blizzard
directions: Add crushed ice to a blender container.
Add the remaining ingredients in the order listed.
Blend on low speed 15- 30 seconds, or until frozen stiff.
Serve.

name: Chocolate Mint Parfait
directions: Put the first 5 ingredients into the container of an electric blender.
Break up one of the chocolate mint patties into pieces and add to the blender.
Blend until mixture is smooth and creamy.
Pour mixture into 2 chilled glasses.
Garnish each with cumbled remaining chocolate mint patty.

name: Rose Petal
directions: Process all the ingredients in a blender or food processor on high until smooth.
Pour mixture into 4 cocktail glasses.
If desired, place 2 raspberries or a marachino cherry on each of 4 decorative toothpicks to serve with drinks.

name: Iced Hot Chocolate
directions: Bring 3 cups of milk, 1/3 cup water, and sugar to a simmer in heavy large saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Remove from heat.
Add chocolate and whisk until melted and smooth.
Refrigerate until well chilled, about 4 hours (Can be made one day ahead. Cover and keep refridgerated).
Mix 3/4 cup milk into chocolate mixture.
Working in batches, blend until frothy.
Divide ice among 4 glasses.
Pour Chocolate mixture over and serve.

name: Pink Russian Spring
directions: Add all the ingredients to the container of an electric blender.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass.
Enjoy.

name: Very Low Cal Cappuccino Cooler
directions: Empty the contents of the capp. envelope in the blender.
Add about four or five ice cubes.
Add enough water to ensure proper mixing.
Pulse the blender (I use the ice crushing button).
Keep adding more ice add until you have the right constistency (I like mine as thick as it can get!).
You may need to add more water, just use your best judgement.
Last add a little cinn.
,cinn-sugar, sweet n' low, or even Free Coolwhip.

name: cocoa-mocha, sugar free international coffee
directions: Uses 2 large mixing bowls and blender.
Take one cup of splenda and put in blender already running on High.
Keep blender covered and do not breathe!
Change to pulse and keep pulsing until sugar substitute is powdered.
put splenda in large mixing bowl.
Mix loosely together with rest of ingredients.
after mixing loosely use mixing cup to place approximately one and one half cups of dry ingredients in blender at one time.
vary between pulse and high, turning off and scraping sides of blender, until combined to a smooth light chocolate colored powder.
(keep an eye on the blender so it doesn't overheat).
Pour powder in clean mixing bowl and continue mixing dry ingredients in batches until done with all.
Package in jars, ziplock bags, and original instant coffee container.

name: Cucumber Cleanser Drink
directions: Push everything through the tube of the juicer.

name: Mexican Horchata
directions: Place the rice in a bowl with enough hot water to cover.
Let the rice sit overnight.
Next day, remove the water.
Place 1/2 cup of rice, and 2 cups milk in a blender.
Blend until rice is all ground up.
Mix in 1/4 cup sugar,.
1/2 teaspoons vanilla,.
1/4 teaspoons cinnamon.
Do the same with the other half of the ingredients.
Strain through cheesecloth (or whatever).
Serve over ice.

similar.name: Atol De Elote (Sweet Corn and Milk Drink)

name: Fruit Cooler
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.
Pour over ice and serve.

name: Tomato-Vegetable Cocktail
directions: Put all ingredients, except ice cubes in blender.
Cover and run on high speed until vegetables are liquified.
Add ice cubes, one at a time, while blender is running.
Serve after ice cubes are crushed.

name: Supa Sowa Slushie
directions: Blend ice until mostly crushed.
Add Kool-Aid and sugar; blend thoroughly.
Enjoy!

name: Holiday Venitian Creme
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender or food processor for 3 min.
refrigerate until cold.
Serve in various ways: Pour over ice cream, a liquor-type drink, or over ice.
It's a change from egg nog.

name: Alto Mira Special Ramaos Fizz
directions: Place all ingredients except nutmeg with 1/4 cup crushed ice in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Strain into tall glass.
Garnish with nutmeg.

name: Banana Colada
directions: In an electric blender,combine bananas,pineapple juice, cream of coconut and rum.
Blend until the mixture reaches your disired consistency.

similar.name: Pina Colada from the Mangapwani Beach Club in Zanzibar

name: Banana Tree
directions: Place all ingredients except banana slice with skin and pineapple juice in blender.
Blend until thick and creamy.
Pour into 14 oz wine glass.
Garnish with banana slice dipped into pineapple juice.

name: Blue Barrel
directions: Pour all ingredients except lime slices into 18 oz wine glass with salted rim (dip moisten rim in salt).
Fill with crushed ice.
Stir well.
Garnish with lime slices.

name: Blue Boar Nun
directions: Place dry cocoa in saucepan.
Add coffee and stir.
Add half& half cream.
Heat but do not boil.
Add liqueur.
stir well.
Pour into 5 oz glassServe with cookie.

name: Bower's Excursion
directions: Pour all ingredients, except lemon and orange peel strips over ice cubes in cocktail shaker.
Shake well, strain into cocktail glass.
Twist lemon and orange peels above drink and drop into glass.

name: Brewer's Racker
directions: Pour tequila and ice tea into chilled tall 13 oz glass.
Fill with ice cubes.
add sugar to taste.
Stir well.
Garnish with lemon wedges and lime slice.

name: Cactus Cooler
directions: Pour equal parts of Tequila and pineapple juice into a tall glass of cubes and top with ginger ale.

name: Cafe Freeze
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into tall 13 oz glass.

name: California Root Beer Float
directions: Pour all ingredients, except club soda, over ice in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Strain into 7 oz wine glass.
Top with club soda.

name: Caribbean Breeze
directions: Shake all ingredients in a shaker and serve in a tall glass.
Makes 1 serving.

similar.name: Pina Colada from the Mangapwani Beach Club in Zanzibar

name: Coffee Alto Mira
directions: Pour brandy into 6 oz wine glass.
Fill glass with coffe.
stir well.
Top with a swirl of whipped cream.

name: Comfort Eggnog
directions: Chill ingredients, blend in punch bowl by beating, dust with nutmeg.
Serves 10, pleases everyone.

name: Comfort Wallbanger
directions: Fill tall glass withice cubes.
Add liquore.
fill with orange juice, stir.

name: Yellow Bird
directions: Put ingredients in Blender and a few cubes of Ice,blend and Serve.
Cheers!

name: Frozen Strawberry Kiwi-tini
directions: Place the ginger ale, vodka and drink mix in a blender, cover and blend until drink mix is completely dissolved.
Add ice, blend on high speed until smooth.
Pour into 6 martini glasses, and garnish each with a slice of kiwi and strawberry.

similar.name: Frozen Mango and Mint Spiced Daiquiri

name: Homemade Frappe Cappuccino
directions: Mix the sugar and coco together first then combine all ingredients in a glass or bottle.
Shake or stir rapidly until well combined and frothy (I save  store bought Frappuncino bottles and use them after running the bottles and caps through the dishwasher).
Store unused Frappuncinos in the refrigerator as you would fresh milk and shake or stir before using.
Note: I sometimes include an ounce or two of half-and-half with the milk for a thicker, richer beverage.

name: Cat's Meow Cocktail
directions: Pour Kahlua, vodka, cream and ice into a blender.
Blend until thick.
Pour into a martini glass.
Place a half of cherry in the center for the nose.
For whiskers, use chocolate or caramel syrup.
NOTE You can use skim milk instead of whipping cream for a"Skinny Cat's Meow".

name: Frappuccino Light...just Like That Star Place
directions: Prepare double strength French roast coffee by brewing with twice the grounds required by your coffee maker.
Chill the coffee (so as to not melt the ice).
Combine all ingredients (except whipped cream) in a blender and blend on high speed until the ice is crushed and drink is smooth.
Pour into 2 16-ounce glasses and add whipped cream on top.
Serve with a straw.

name: Navy Grog
directions: Mix in a blender until smooth.
Serve with fresh speared fruit or mint for garnish, if desired.

name: Chill out Frozen Hot Chocolate
directions: Pour milk into blender.
Add hot cocoa mix and ice.
Blend first at low speed and then high speed until ice is finely crushed and slushy.
Pour into tall glass and top with whipped cream and a dusting of hot cocoa mix, if desired.
Serve with a straw and enjoy!

P.S. This recipe was originally posted using small ice cubes.  At our shop we have a commercial blender that has no problem getting through these.  Since most people have regular blenders, I have changed it to crushed ice.

name: Cherry Vanilla Thrilla'
directions: Pour ingredients into a shaker.
Shake.
Pour.
Garnish with a Maraschino Cherry.

name: Chocolate Cookies and Cream Cocktail
directions: Add all the ingredients to the container of a blender.
Cover; pulse on and off until the mixture begins to swirl evenly.
Blend on high for 20 seconds or until completely smooth.
Pour into a chilled glass.

name: Miami Vise
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and process until smooth.

name: Creamy Nonalcoholic Margaritas
directions: Place the partially frozen yogurt, soda and lime juice into a blender and process until smooth.
If desired, wet the rims of your margarita glasses and dip into either kosher salt or sugar.
Pour drink into the glasses.
Garnish w/ lime slices, if desired.

similar.name: Atol De Elote (Sweet Corn and Milk Drink)
Pina Colada from the Mangapwani Beach Club in Zanzibar

name: Lemon Drop Cocktail
directions: Add all the ingrients to a blender.
Pulse on and off until the mixture blends easily.
Blend on high speed for 30 seconds or until smooth.
**Peach Bomb--substitute peach sorbet for lemon sorbet; add 1/2 tablespoon peach schnapps before blending.
**Pear Blast--substitute pear sorbet for lemon sorbet; add 1/2 tablespoon pear liqueur before blending.
Raspberry Blast--substitute raspberry sorbet for lemon sorbet; add 1/2 tablespoon raspberry liqueuer (I recommend Chambord) before blending.

name: Springbok Frozen
directions: Blend ingredients with crushed ice until slushy and serve.
Mint leaf and sprinkle of chocolate/chocolate powder.

name: Screaming Orgasm
directions: Blend all the ingredients with cruched ice.

name: Death by Chocolate
directions: Blend all ingredients together with crushed ice and serve.
Garnish with shavings of chocolate if desired.

name: Unknownchef86's Poor Man's Eggnog Latte
directions: Add the eggnog to taste and stir well.
Top with the whipped cream, if desired, and a sprinkle of nutmeg.
Enjoy!

name: Jamaican Coffee
directions: In a food processor combine chocolate, sugar and cinnamon, chopping using 3 on/off turns and then finish processing until mixture is fine.

With machine running pour hot milk and vanilla  through food tube and blend until chocolate is melted (10 seconds). *Can be prepared ahead to this point and refrigerated for up to 2 days, bringing to room temperature before proceeding.
With the food processor running pour cream through food tube, processing until thick.
Reheat chocolate mixture in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring frequently.
Stir in coffee.
Pour into cups, topping with whipped cream.

name: Lemon, Lime and Bitters Crush
directions: Combine sugar, wine and water in a large heavy-based pan, stir over heat, without boiling, until sugar dissolves.
Bring to boil, simmer, uncovered, without stirring, for about 20 minutes or until syrup is thickened slightly (syrup must not change colour), cool to room temperature.
Stir in juices and bitters.
Pour mixture into 23cm square cake pan, cover with foil and freeze until firm.
Beat lemon mixture in large bowl with electric mixer until smooth.
Beat egg whites in a small bowl with an electric mixer until firm peaks form.
Fold egg whites into lemon mixture in 2 batches.
Return mixture to cake pan, cover and freeze until firm.

name: London Fog
directions: Boil water and steep tea bag for approximately 4 minutes.
While steeping, froth your milk.
Add stevia and vanilla. Stir.
Ladle milk on top.

name: Mexican Hot Chocolate
directions: Pour first 7 ingredients (water - nutmeg) in blender until smooth.
Add eggs (see note in description).
With machine running, slowly add hot milk through the hole in top of the blender cover, blending until foamy.
Serve immediately with extra hot milk or whipped cream.

name: Purple Cow Drink Mix
directions: Mix the ingredients in a blender for 1 minute.
Drink. Enjoy!

name: Bailey's Chocolate Milkshake
directions: Dip the rim of a glass in the chocolate sauce, allowing it to drip down the side.
Place the remaining sauce in a blender with the milk, liqueur and 1 scoop of the ice cream and buzz until thick and rich.
Spoon remaining ice cream into a milkshake glass and pour in the milkshake mix.

name: Frozen Amarula Blush
directions: Blend all ingredients together.
Serve.
Garnish with a fresh raspberry.

name: Raspberry Chill
directions: Combine tequila, lime juice, sugar, raspberries and 1 cup ice in blender.  Puree.  Pour into 2 large glasses half filled with ice.
Add 1/2 to 1/2" club soda to each glass.  Stir gently.  Garnish with lime.

similar.name: Diet 7 up Raspberry Ice - Weight Watchers
Frozen Mango and Mint Spiced Daiquiri

name: Pomegranate-Raspberry Margaritas
directions: Freeze pomegranate juice in and ice cube tray for 4 hours, or until the juice is solid.
In a blender, add the frozen juice, 1 1/2 cups ice cubes, raspberries, tequila, orange liqueur, lime juice, and sugar.  Blend mixture until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

similar.name: Frozen Mango and Mint Spiced Daiquiri

name: Easiest Iced Coffee
directions: Place coffee in filter/brew basket, add water to coffee maker, and brew as normal.
Cool completely. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Pour coffee over ice cubes into tall glasses. Add normal amounts of creamer and sugar, if desired.

name: Pear Power Slushy
directions: Place all ingredients in blender container; blend for 45-60 seconds or until smooth.
Pour into chilled 8oz glass.

name: Sugar Free Pina Colada
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Blend on high speed for 30 seconds.
Pour into a cute cocktail glass.
Then share this recipe with everyone you know!

similar.name: Pina Colada from the Mangapwani Beach Club in Zanzibar

name: Lemon Charge
directions: Using a blender or food processor, blend the strawberries and sugar together.
Slowly pour in the milk and yogurt and blend until frothy.
Garnish with a lemon slice or sliced strawberry.

name: Puerto Aventuras Cocktail
directions: Mix in a blender with ice.
Increase or decrease ingredients based on your preference.
Pour into a pina colada glass.

name: Banana Cow
directions: Combine banana, milk, honey, vanilla and ice in container of blender.
Whirl until smooth.

name: Coffee Frappé - South Beach
directions: Add ice, coffee, milk, sugar substitute, and syrup to a blender.
Blend on high speed until mixture is smooth and ice is incorporated.
Pour into tall glasses and garnish with whipped topping.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Frappuccino Light...just Like That Star Place

name: Pear Sunset
directions: Puree all ingredients in blender until smooth.
Serve.

name: Dunkin Donuts Coffee
directions: Brew fresh ground coffee with 9 cups of water measured in coffee maker pot.
Pour in 1 standard coffee cup add 3 teaspoons of sugar stir till mixed.
Add 1-2 tablespoons half and half.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Frog in a Blender
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender, including the lime wheels.
Blend for 3-5 seconds.
Make sure that the ingredients do not completely blend.
Pour into a chilled hurricane glass.

name: Orange Yogurt Beverage
directions: Mix 3 ingredients in the blender.
Mix until the mixture is creamy.

name: Unknownchef86's Poor Man's Mocha
directions: Empty the hot chocolate mix into the cup and add the milk; stir together until blended and smooth.
Continue to stir while pouring the coffee into the cup; stir thoroughly to blend. Add more milk if desired.
Top with whipped cream (if desired) and enjoy!

name: Berried in Chocolate Cocktail
directions: Line martini glass with syrups if using.
Place remaining ingredients in a blender & blend until smooth.
Serve.

name: Frosty Cocktail
directions: Add all ingredients to blender and blend on high until smooth.
Pour into rocks glasses and serve with straw.

name: Liquid Lamington Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth & garnish with desiccated coconut.

name: Limeade Sunset Slush
directions: Place 1/4 cup cranberry juice in each of 4 glasses and set aside.
Process limeade and ice in blender until smooth; divide among prepared glasses.
Top each serving with 1/4 cup ginger ale.

name: Beach Bum's Cooler
directions: Pour all ingredients into a blender. Blend until smooth, and pour into a parfait glass. Garnish with a pineapple slice. Add a paper umbrella, and serve.

name: Roasted Mary
directions: In a blender, combine vodka, peppers, Clamato, lime juice and ice and blend until smooth.
Garnish with a sprig of cilantro.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Key Lime Pie
directions: Pour ingredients into a blender with 2 cups crushed ice. Blend at high speed and then pour into a hurricane glass or shake in a cocktail shaker and pour into a martini glass.

name: Shivering Russian
directions: Pour ingredients into a blender with crushed ice. Blend at high speed and pour into a highball glass.

name: Diet 7 up Raspberry Ice - Weight Watchers
directions: In a blender, combine the diet 7-up, raspberry sorbet, raspberries and ice cubes and blend until smooth.
Pour into a 12-ounce glass and garnish with additional raspberries.

name: Gerry's Morning Juice
directions: Prepare the fruit and vegetables for juicing and juice as per the instructions with your particular machine.

name: Atol De Elote (Sweet Corn and Milk Drink)
directions: Use a sharp knife to remove the kernels from the corn and place them in a blender.
Add 1/2 cup milk and puree until completely smooth (2 - 3 minutes).
Transfer the mixture to a medium pot, add the rest of the milk, sugar, cinnamon sticks, and salt.  Stir.
Bring to a boil over medium high heat, stirring constantly.  Then reduce heat to medium low and simmer, still constantly stirring, until the mixture is slightly thickened (about 15 minutes).
Serve hot.

name: Simple Raw Tomato Juice
directions: In a food processor or blender,blend prepaired tomatoes into a liquid.
Salt to taste.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth.
Transfer the juice to a jar with a lid and refrigerate.

name: Bahama Mama
directions: Add ingredients to a blender and blend 30 seconds.
Pour into daiquiri glasses.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge.

name: Jack N' Berry Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients except the lemon-lime soda until ice is smooth.
Pour into glass then stir in the soda.

name: V's Frozen Bikini
directions: In blender crush ice.
Add  peach schnapps, vodka, lemon juice, orange juice and peach nectar. Blend well.
Pour into a red wine glass or margarita glass and top with sparkling wine, garnish with fresh peach or lemon slice.

name: White Chocolate Mint Cappuccino
directions: Put all ingredients in blender.
Blend until the mixture is creamy.  Serve warm.

name: Chocolate Almond Coffee Cooler
directions: In a blender, combine milk, cocoa powder, sugar, coffee and almond extract.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Add ice cubes.
Cover and blend until ice is crushed.
Pour into chilled glasses and top with whipped topping, if desired.
Serve immediately.

name: Peanut Coffee Frenzy
directions: Blend kahlua, milk, ice-cream & peanut butter briefly with half a glassful of crushed ice in a pina colada glass. Add the lemonade and serve.

name: Tahoe Avalanche
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender and blend until frothy.

name: Holiday Party Protein Slushy
directions: Combine juices and water. add equal to taste if it is too tart.
Place all ingredients into blender and blend for 2 minutes.

name: Butterfinger Frosty
directions: Whirl all together in food processor.
Enjoy!

name: Whiskey Sour Slush
directions: Combine all ingredients except the cherries in a blender.
Blend until smooth. (You may need to adjust the ice depending on your preference for consistency.)
Serve in tumblers with straws. Garnish with maraschino cherries.

name: The Snowcone Cocktail
directions: For 4 snow cone cocktails, simply shave 4 cups of ice with the grater blade of a food processor.
Using an ice cream scoop, pack approximately 1 cup shaved ice into a paper snow cone cup (or a cocktail glass), then drizzle with one of our concoctions.
Berry Nice Ice:
In a medium bowl, mix 1 cup vodka and 2 tablespoons cassis.
Add 1 cup frozen blueberries.
Let stand 1 hour.
Strain through a fine mesh strainer into a small pitcher.
Summer Camp Slushy:
It couldn't be simpler: Just chill 1 cup Campari in a small pitcher.
Creamsicle Crush:
In a small pitcher, mix 1/2 cup thawed orange juice concentrate, 1/2 cup Grand Marnier, and 3 tablespoons vanilla vodka.
Stir to combine.

name: Raspberry Mocha Madness Swappuccino
directions: Place coffee, cocoa, Splenda and Coffee-mate in a glass. Add 1 oz. hot water to glass, and stir to dissolve ingredients. Next add Almond Breeze and Torani syrup and stir briefly. Now place contents of glass in a blender. Add ice and blend on high speed until well blended.
Pour into a tall glass, and finish off with whipped cream.

name: Traditional Eggnog
directions: In a large bowl and using a mixer, beat the egg yolks together with the sugar for approx 10 minutes (you want the mixture to be firm and the colour of butter).
Very slowly, add in the bourbon and brandy - just a little at a time.
When bourbon and brandy have been added, allow the mixture to cool in the fridge (for up to 6 hours, depending on how long before your party you're making the eggnog).
30 minutes before your guests arrive, stir the milk into the chilled yolk mixture.
Stir in 1+ ½ teaspoons ground nutmeg.
In a separate bowl, beat the cream with a mixer on high speed until the cream forms stiff peaks.
In yet another bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Gently fold the egg white mixture into the egg yolk mixture.
Gently fold the cream into the egg mixture.
After ladling into cups, garnish with the remainder of the ground nutmeg.

name: Puerto Rican Eggnog "coquito"
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender on low for about 1 minute, chill in the refrigerator serve cold.

name: Siggi's Chocolate Sailor
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Health Break
directions: Place flax seeds in blender and mix until they are finely ground.
Add skim milk, coconut milk, protein powder, and orange juice.
Blend.

name: Frangelico Float
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Serve in a highball glass and garnish with whipped cream.

name: Rose Banana
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Silk Stocking Cocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Garnish with chocolate flakes to serve.

name: Fruit Tingle Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients in a blender until smooth.

name: Tropical Dream
directions: Put the ice cubes into a food processor or blender with the rum, melon liquor, coconut cream, and fruit juices.
Blend for about 10 seconds.  Add the creme de banane and the banana and blend for a further 10 seconds.
Pour into a tall glass, decorate with a banana wedge, and serve with a straw.

name: Frozen Mango and Mint Spiced Daiquiri
directions: Put some crushed ice in a food processor or blender.
Add the lime juice, sugar syrup, rum, mango, and mint leaves and blend until smooth.
Pour into a large Champagne saucer (I used a sangria glass) and decorate with a mango slice and a mint sprig.

name: Orange Judas #1
directions: Put everything in a blender and whirl for a few minutes or until frothy.

name: Orange Judas #2
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and whirl for 1 minute!
*NOTE:  i'm not actually sure what the amount of Dream whip in one package is, that # is there to appease the computer god's!

name: Red-Head Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients except cherry advokaat. Float cherry advokaat on top of drink.

name: Bahama Mama
directions: add all ingredients to blender, including some ice.
blend for 30 seconds.
enjoy.

name: Pineapple Tango
directions: Freeze peach chunks.
Blend together pineapple juice, lemon juice, water, sugar and yogurt.
Add frozen pineapple and peach chunks, blend until smooth.
Wet rims of 2 martini glasses and dip in coloured sugar; garnish with peach wedge and serve!

name: Tomato Blazer
directions: Put tomato juice, worcestershire sauce, hot sauce (feel free to add more if you like it hot!) into food processor and gently blend till combined.  Add the scallion and ice and blend till smooth.
Garnish with a lime wedge, pickle wedge, celery stick or cherry tomato -- or a combo of these on a skewer!  Serve.

name: Creamy Maple Shake
directions: Pour the milk and maple syrup into a food processor and gently blend.
Add the ice cream and extract and process till smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses and enjoy!

name: Orange Tocirpa
directions: Add apricots to boiling water and let sit 8 hours or overnight (not included in prep time).
In a blender, puree apricots and their water.  add orange juice and blend till combined.
Pour mix into 2 glasses and carefully spoon 1 tablespoon yogurt on top of each, then sprinkle 1/2 tsp brown sugar on yogurt.  Serve.

name: Holiday Margaritas
directions: In a blender combine juice concentrate, tequila, orange liqueur, melon liqueur, and ice cubes until combined.
Dip rim of glasses in corn syrup then decorating sugar.
Divide mixture into 6 glasses.

name: Vanilla Bean Drink
directions: Combine heavy whipping cream, milk, scraped vanilla bean, and vanilla extract in mixing cup.
Top with whipped topping.
Enjoy!
OR add ice and blend in blender until smooth.
Top with whipped topping.
Enjoy!
OR heat up in microwave for 30 second intervals until warm.
Top with whipped topping.
Enjoy!

name: Bubble Milk Tea (Boba)
directions: Make the sugar syrup by combining granulated sugar, brown sugar, and water into a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Stirring often.
Once mixture begins to simmer remove from heat. Cool and refrigerate until ready to use. Will keep for up to a month in a tightly sealed container.
Once syrup is chilled, combined tea, syrup, milk, and ice in a shaker or blender. I prefer a shaker but if you like blended drinks use a blender.
Shake until completely mixed.
Add tapioca pearls to a tall glass and pour in milk tea.
Use a large straw and enjoy!

name: Hot Pama Cocoa
directions: Microwave a cup of hot cocoa and add liqueur.
Optional:  Infuse some whipped cream with PAMA to top cocoa, sprinkle with cinnamon and add a cinnamon stick for garnish.

name: Pama Daiquiri
directions: Pour ingredients in blender with a cup of crushed ice.
Blend well.
Serve in a margarita glass or a hurricane style glass.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Raspberry Frappuccino
directions: Place coffee, cocoa, Splenda and Coffee-mate in a glass. Add 1 oz. hot water to glass, and stir to dissolve ingredients. Next add Almond Breeze and Torani syrup and stir briefly.
Now place contents of glass in a blender. Add ice and blend on high speed until well blended.
Pour into a tall glass, and finish off with whipped cream.

name: Pina Colada from the Mangapwani Beach Club in Zanzibar
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender with some ice and process on high speed until mixed well. (Start with a small amount of ice and adjust to your desired thickness).
Serve in a large hurricane glass with long straws and a wedge of fresh pineapple to garnish.

name: Tony's Favorite Shake (Shakeology)
directions: blend ingredients in a blender.

name: Hot Cocoa Truffle Balls--Drink (W/Variations)
directions: In a medium microwavable bowl, combine all of the ingredients. Microwave for one minute intervals; stirring often until melted, smooth and silky. This may take a few minutes.  Some of the chips will not look melted, but once stirred it will become smooth.  Do not over cook or it will seize.  Stir in cinnamon and nutmeg, if using.
Let the mixture cool 10 minutes at room temperature. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and place in the refrigerator for approximately 2 hours until thick.
Scoop out a scant 1/4 cup of the mixture and place individual scoops on a wax paper-lined baking sheet. Place the baking sheet in the refrigerator and let the mounds harden for 15 minutes.
Once chilled, roll the mounds into balls, pulling the sides of the plastic wrap over to cover the ball.  Place the balls in freezer until ready to use.

Pour 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 cups of whole milk into a microwave-safe mug. Place one unwrapped Hot Cocoa Truffle Ball into the milk. Microwave for 2 minutes. Stir well until the chocolate is combined with the milk. Serve piping hot topped with your choice of whip cream, marshmallows, cinnamon, nutmeg or liqueur.  May add a candy cane or cinnamon stick.
Hot Toffee Truffle Balls:  Substitute the chocolate chips for 2 cups butterscotch chips.
Mexican Hot Chocolate Truffle Balls:  Eliminate the nutmeg.  Add 1/8 tsp cayenne pepper 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract.
Almond Joy Truffle Balls:  Eliminate the cinnamon and nutmeg.  Add in 1 teaspoon each of almond extract and coconut extract.
Reese's Cups Truffle Balls:  Eliminate the cinnamon and nutmeg.  Add in 1/4 cup peanut butter when heating the ingredients.
Andes Mint Truffle Balls:  Eliminate the cinnamon and nutmeg.  Add 1 teaspoon peppermint extract.  Roll in crushed peppermint or serve with candy cane sticks.

name: Blueberry-Peach Daiquiri
directions: Combine the peach, blueberries, rum, blueberry syrup, lime juice, and peach liqueur in a blender with 1 cup of ice.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into two chilled cocktail glasses.
Garnish each with 4 skewered blueberries and 1 tiny peach wedge.

similar.name: Frozen Mango and Mint Spiced Daiquiri

name: At First Blush
directions: Combine the rum, simple syrup, raspberry liqueur, rosé champagne, lime juice, and 2-3 strawberries in a blender with 2 cups ice.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into two or three chilled cocktail glasses (or champagne flutes).
Garnish each with a half strawberry and a sage leaf.

name: Tahitian Pineapple Daiquiri
directions: Combine the rum, vanilla liqueur, pineapple juice, coconut cream, and lime juice in a blender with 1 cup ice.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge.

similar.name: Pina Colada from the Mangapwani Beach Club in Zanzibar

name: Mango Batida
directions: Combine the mango chunks, cachaca, condensed milk, and coconut milk in a blender on high for 10 seconds.
Add 1 cup crushed ice and blend for 3 seconds or until smooth.
Pour into a rocks glass and garnish with a mango slice.

name: Pure Ecstacy
directions: In a blender add the baileys and kahlua; do not fill past one third. Add enough ice to fill the blender. Blend on a low speed continually adding ice until a milkshake texture is achieved.
Add vodka, more for strong, less for weak. Mix inches Serve.

name: Frozen Hurricane (N'awlins Style) Cocktail
directions: Put all the ingredients into blender. Add ice and blend until slushy. Pour into a tall high-ball or large margarita glass.

name: Baileys Shiver
directions: Drop 2 large ice cubes into a blender.
Add Baileys Original Irish Cream.
Blend until completely smooth.
Serve in a tall glass.

name: Jamaican  Carrot  Drink
directions: cook carrot  in water.
cool.
blend   all ingredients until  smooth.

similar.name: Atol De Elote (Sweet Corn and Milk Drink)

name: Easy Microwave Mulled "Apple Cider"
directions: Combine all ingredients in a microwave safe mug.
Place mug in microwave and cook on HIGH for 1-2 minutes, depending on the wattage of your microwave. You may have to wait for a minute or so before you drink it, because it will be hot.
Enjoy your "cider"! TIP: this tastes even better with a little caramel sauce stirred into it!

name: Almond Milk
directions: Soak almonds overnight, at least 8 hours.  Soak dates 10 to 30 minutes to soften, then remove pitts.
Place almonds and water in blender and blend until smooth.
Strain the mixture through a fine mesh strainer or cheesecloth.
Put the milk back into the blender carafe and add vanilla extract, dates, and honey.  Blend until smooth.
The milk will last in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.  Shake well before using.

name: Chocolate Avocado Smoothie
directions: Blend Almond Milk, spinach, water, and avocado until smooth.
Add remaining ingredients blending until smooth.

name: Brita® Mocktail
directions: Peel a cucumber and cut it up.
Grind it in a food processor to make juice.
Add ice cold Brita® filtered water.
Add fresh lime juice, fresh dill, and agave nectar.

name: Mimi's Ginger Beer
directions: Put ginger in food processor with enough cold water to process. Scrape purée into large heatproof glass or ceramic bowl or pitcher.
Add boiling water, honey, cloves, cinnamon, zest and juice. Cover loosely with towel and keep mixture in a warm pace for about 4 hours, skimming off the foam as it accumulates.
Stir in 1 quart cold water and taste for sweetness, adding more honey or lemon or lime juice.
Strain and pour into ceramic or glass bottles. Cap tightly and refrigerate.
Can be served as soon as it's chilled, or wait 2-3 days for it to ferment and become fizzy. Use within one week.

name: Choc-Hazelnut Cream Liqueur (Dairy Free)
directions: Break chocolate into pieces. Process chocolate 15 seconds, on high. Set aside. No need to rinse bowl/jug.

Blitz hazelnuts 20 seconds, med-high speed, so it looks like nut meal. Add almond milk and set to 3 min on high. Test texture. If still grainy or gritty between  your fingers do another 2 min on high.
Put chocolate back in the bowl, add brown sugar and hot water. Mix for 3 min on low - medium speed.
Add alcohol of choice. 10 seconds on low - medium speed.

Serve immediately over ice or refrigerate for 2 hours, preferably overnight for best results. It thickens upon refrigeration. I put it in sterilised pasata bottles, so you can spoon it out if required.
Once flavours have infused, serve over ice. Can water down if too thick.
Makes about 1.5L give or take tasting and tweaking. Can keep for up to 2-3 months - if it lasts that long. I've had it longer in the fridge.
NOTES:
*  Yes there is a lot of sugar! It's a substitute for condensed milk. The nut to liquid ratio determines the thickness of the liquid.
*  To make this into a custard/mousse, reduce the water to 250 grams. It's very rich, so only small serves.
*  Be warned! It's addictive! :).

name: FRUIT SMOOTHIE
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Blend until smooth.
